scripts.smoke: pnpm smoke:clanky && pnpm smoke:voice && pnpm smoke:agent-tools && pnpm smoke:subagents
scripts.voice:native:check: OPUS_STATIC=1 LIBOPUS_STATIC=1 OPUS_NO_PKG=1 LIBOPUS_NO_PKG=1 OPUS_NO_PKG_CONFIG=1 CMAKE_POLICY_VERSION_MINIMUM=3.5 cargo check --locked --manifest-path agents/clanky/src/voice/clankvox/Cargo.toml
scripts.voice:native:test: OPUS_STATIC=1 LIBOPUS_STATIC=1 OPUS_NO_PKG=1 LIBOPUS_NO_PKG=1 OPUS_NO_PKG_CONFIG=1 CMAKE_POLICY_VERSION_MINIMUM=3.5 cargo test --locked --manifest-path agents/clanky/src/voice/clankvox/Cargo.toml
scripts.voice:build: OPUS_STATIC=1 LIBOPUS_STATIC=1 OPUS_NO_PKG=1 LIBOPUS_NO_PKG=1 OPUS_NO_PKG_CONFIG=1 CMAKE_POLICY_VERSION_MINIMUM=3.5 cargo build --release --locked --manifest-path agents/clanky/src/voice/clankvox/Cargo.toml
